name: Mizuho Medy Co.,Ltd.
summary: Mizuho Medy Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells in-vitro diagnostic products primarily in Japan. The company provides immuno assay test products, such as influenza virus kits; Infectious diseases test kits; fecal occult blood test kits for detection of human hemoglobin and human transferrin in feces; and biochemical liquid stable reagents for professionals. It also offers HCG (midstream test), including digital p-check test for OTC. The company also operates in the United States, Belgium, France, China, South Korea, Singapore, and Taiwan. Mizuho Medy Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Tosu, Japan.
